mechanism: Wrongness blame sanction and repair are treated as one undifferentiated response
Observers infer motive too quickly from identity outcome or group narrative
possible_dampener: Require evidence alternatives and humility around intention

mechanism: Good intentions are used to ignore actual harm
possible_dampener: Model harm and repair even when intention is low

mechanism: Judgment becomes humiliation or punishment without proportion
possible_dampener: Include dignity preservation repair opportunity and proportionality

mechanism: Complexity or neutrality is used to avoid clear harm
Judgment is stronger for outsiders than allies
Public judgment circulates before facts context or intention are clear
possible_dampener: Slow judgment verify evidence and preserve dignity

mechanism: Institutions frame judgment around liability and image control
possible_dampener: Separate truth-seeking repair and public relations

mechanism: Wrongdoers or victims are treated as less than fully human

possible_dampener: Connect judgment to apology restitution redesign protection and follow-up
